subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Most Holy Court, and from it wafted the fragrances of love. Praise thou the Beloved of the world, Who hath adorned thee with the light of His Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات بساحت اقدس فائز و نفحات محبت از او متضوع حمد کن محبوب عالم را که بانوار کلمه مزین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for nearness to God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
